name: Rope Racer O'Neon
short_description: This is a neon world and racers who can use the rope. Choose your car, paint it however you want, gather crystals and try to cross the finish line!
detailed_description:
Simple, but very funny physic puzzle game.

This is a neon world and racers who can use the rope.
Choose your car, paint it however you want, gather crystals and try to cross the finish line!
Earn money for the best vehicle.
Physics will help you.
Avoid the walls, ride on the ground.
Swing on the rope, jump, fly up and hover!
Also, you can open game modes: gravity, boost and teleportation.

Special features:
- Ropes
- Vehicles
- Retrowave music
- Meditative gameplay

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Dutch, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish, Japanese
